Released: 26 March 2026

This is a minor release of PGD 4 for customers on an Extended Life Support contract. This release is a prerequisite for upgrading to PGD 6.3.0+. This release also includes a number of bug fixes. 

## Bug Fixes

<table class="table w-100"><thead><tr><th>Component</th><th>Version</th><th>Description</th><th width="10%">Addresses</th></tr></thead><tbody>
<tr><td>BDR</td><td>4.4.2</td><td><details><summary>Fixed a replication crash loop caused by interrupted partition detaching.</summary><hr/><p>Resolved an issue where logical replication would enter an infinite crash loop if a <code>DETACH PARTITION CONCURRENTLY</code> command was interrupted. Previously, the walsender would fail with the error <code>relation has no parent because it's being detached</code> when decoding WAL for a partition in a <code>detach-pending</code> state.</p>
</details></td><td>53628, 59291</td></tr>
<tr><td>BDR</td><td>4.4.2</td><td><details><summary>Fixed a segmentation fault occurring during <code>COPY</code> commands when <code>pgaudit.role</code> set to a non-default value.</summary><hr/><p>Resolved an issue where Postgres would crash with a segmentation fault when executing a <code>COPY</code> command if the <code>pgaudit.role</code> configuration was set to a non-default value.</p>
</details></td><td>58060</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
